name: Vision Extract
description: Analyzes an attached image or image-based document, then writes a concise final answer from the vision result.

nodes.title: Vision
nodes.prompt: Analyze the attached image. If it looks like a document or screenshot, extract visible text with paragraph breaks. If it is a scene or object, describe the relevant visible details. Do not invent invisible details.

nodes.title: Answer
nodes.prompt: Formulate the final answer from the user's request and the vision result. Preserve extracted text when that is the useful output.
